entitySuffixRule: Must contain the words "limited liability company" or the abbreviation "L.L.C.," "LLC," "L.C.," or "LC" (periods and punctuation optional). A low-profit LLC uses "low-profit limited liability company" or the abbreviation "L3C."
distinguishabilityNote: The name must not be indistinguishable from the name of any domestic LLC or authorized foreign LLC in good standing, a corporation under the Business Corporation Act, a nonprofit corporation, a limited partnership, or any name reserved, registered, or assumed under this act or the other corporate acts. The name also may not contain a word or phrase implying a purpose other than the one permitted by the articles of organization. A conflicting name may be used with the other holder's written consent.
nameReservationCostBasis: The LARA fee for an Application for Reservation of Name (Form 540) is $25 for an LLC.
notes: Michigan is not a Secretary of State state for businesses: LLCs are formed, named, and searched at the Department of Licensing and Regulatory Affairs (LARA), Corporations, Securities & Commercial Licensing Bureau. MCL 450.4204 folds reserved, registered, and assumed names into the distinguishability screen, so an assumed name already on file can block a later LLC name. A reservation lasts 180 days for $25. Michigan is inexpensive to form in ($50 LLC) with a low $25 annual statement due February 15.

sources.title: Michigan Limited Liability Company Act — Name; requirements; rights
